description: Sector overlay for French exploration, mining, quarrying, mineral-title holders, geothermal operations, environmental controls, post-mining obligations, and mining documentation.

metadata.scope: France-only sector overlay controls for Mining. Intended to be used with france_core_control_library.
metadata.source_note: Source basis is mapped from official French/EU legal, regulatory, supervisory, and guidance sources available at rule-pack publication time. This starter pack is not legal advice and requires expert validation before production reliance.
metadata.external_knowledge_policy: No external knowledge is introduced during document evaluation. Regulatory source mappings live only in this versioned rule pack.

rules.title: Mining title, exclusive research permit, or concession evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for mining title, exclusive exploration/research permit, concession, mining code, or state-granted subsoil right evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this sector control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified France compliance/legal reviewer must confirm applicability, current legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: Works authorization or mining-operation control evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for authorization of works, drilling, quarrying, excavation, operational plan, safety, or inspection evidence.

rules.title: Environmental authorization, impact, or remediation evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for environmental authorization, impact assessment, water/soil protection, rehabilitation, site closure, or pollution control evidence.
